scripts.test:build-ai: deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x1.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x2.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-1x3.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-C.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-J.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-L.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-PLUS.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-S.test.ts && deno test --no-check test/build-ai-SR.test.ts
scripts.test:online: timeout 10 deno test --no-check test/online-checkpoints.test.ts && timeout 30 deno test --no-check test/online-full-state.test.ts && timeout 10 deno test --no-check test/online-phase-transitions.test.ts && timeout 10 deno test --no-check test/online-phantom-dedup.test.ts && timeout 10 deno test --no-check test/online-migration-mode.test.ts && timeout 10 deno test --no-check test/online-migration-seq.test.ts
scripts.test:e2e:all: npm run test:e2e:cannon-cursor && npm run test:e2e:banner
scripts.test:parallel: bash -c 'deno run test/headless.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/determinism.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/territory.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/scenario.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/modern-mode.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/online-checkpoints.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/online-full-state.test.ts & deno test --no-check test/reselect-clumsy.test.ts & wait'
scripts.test:all: npm run test:scenario && npm run test:determinism && npm run test:headless && npm run test:territory && npm run test:reselect && npm run test:build-ai && npm run test:online && npm run test:e2e:local:quick
scripts.lint:all: tsc --noEmit && npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:unused && npm run lint:circular && npm run lint:duplicates && npm run lint:literals && npm run lint:layers && npm run lint:domains && npm run lint:imports && npm run lint:architecture && npm run lint:restricted && npm run lint:phase-transitions && npm run lint:typeof && npm run lint:null-init && npm run lint:deno
scripts.reorder:changed: git diff --cached --name-only --diff-filter=ACM -- 'src/*.ts' | xargs -I{} npx tsx scripts/reorder-file.ts {}
